center.name: 普諾省
center.summary: 普諾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-backed grosbeak，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: aureoventris, breeds in Peru's Puno Province, western and southern Bolivia, and northwestern Argentina

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: aureoventris, breeds in Peru's Puno Province, western and southern Bolivia, and northwestern Argentina
